changelog: Split Setup Wizard into three focused panels: Setup Wizard, Settings, and Updates
Settings panel now houses all configuration: General, OU Monitoring, Cache, Thresholds, Chat Alerts, Daily Digest, and Whitelist
Setup Wizard is now lean and first-run focused: API keys, Map Access, and Install actions only
Updates panel is now standalone with auto-check on open, changelog display, and Apply Update
Sticky Save All button added to bottom of Settings panel
Navigation links between all three panels
Menu reorganized with Advanced and Diagnostics submenus
